title: Renamium
description: Renamium is a mod for Minecraft based on the Fabric API for viewing item renames and entity renames in resource packs.
body:
# Renamium

Resource pack rename manager for the anvil.

---

## What It Does

**Renamium** displays a comprehensive list of all available renames from your active resource packs directly within the anvil interface. Instead of memorizing or manually typing complex names, you can browse and select them from a convenient menu with a single click.

---

## Features

* **Format Support:** Full compatibility with CIT (OptiFine), CEM, and the new Minecraft 1.21.5+ item stack components.
* **Quick Search:** Filter through large lists of renames by name.
* **Item Preview:** Hover over any entry to see a visual preview of the renamed item.
* **Creative Tab:** A dedicated tab containing all available renames for easy access.
* **Customization:** Animation and interface settings via **Mod Menu**.

---

## Usage

1.  Open any **Anvil**.
2.  Click the **Renamium button** on the left side of the UI.
3.  Select your desired rename from the list to apply it instantly.

---

## Credits

* Idea: [LopyMine](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-anvil)
